subject: Luvale
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Vyuma vyakutenga mu Litilicha vyalipandama nachinyingi chakushikulu. Unetava
topics: Chilongeselo chino, valongi vanapanjika milimo yamu Litilicha yakufwana nge myaso,
vishimo, mijimbu navikwavo kuchiyoyelo chavathu. Chikwavo nawa, vanasondwesa
